component.name: Wombat
component.summary: High-precision scientific calculator with full unit support, powered by Numbat

description.p: Wombat gives Numbat a friendly face: a high-precision graphical calculator built for scientists and engineers. Designed for unit-aware scientific computing, conversions just work—no need to juggle factors or second-guess results. Type expressions naturally, mix units freely, and let Wombat keep your calculations consistent, your units correct, and your workflow smooth.
